tasks.subject: Fix Bug 1: $$ does NOT escape $ in recipes
tasks.description: In crates/mk-core/src/recipe.rs, in the run() function, before passing script to shell.execute(), replace all occurrences of $$ with $. Must handle edge case: $$$ → $$ (two literal $, not one). Add test in recipe.rs.

tasks.subject: Fix Bug 2: $(wildcard ...) in prereqs causes perpetual staleness
tasks.description: Detect $(...) syntax in prereq position and produce a clear parse error. Do NOT implement $(wildcard ...) — suggest using * glob patterns instead. Catch during parsing in parse.rs. Add test.
